description:
This quiz assesses practical skills in context window management, token budgeting, retrieval strategies, and prompt structuring for production AI systems. It begins with foundational concepts but quickly escalates to intermediate and advanced difficulty, emphasizing real-world debugging and optimization. The tone is pragmatic and direct, prioritizing hands-on engineering rigor over theoretical knowledge.
Topics: Context windows, Token budgets, Retrieval systems, Prompt structure, AI failure modes, Prompt caching, Hybrid search
Audience: AI engineers, ML practitioners, and developers building production-grade LLM applications
